head.hi: Prime Minister Churchill to President Roosevelt
head.note: Sent by the United States Military Attaché, London, via Army channels.

div.p: Prime Minister to President Roosevelt. Personal and top secret. Number 688. Your 546.Supra.

5. I am indeed sorry to hear the long time that must elapse before we meet on your programme. When the immediate situation in Overlord clarifies I would make an effort to meet you at Quebec or Bermuda. The former seems easier if this were agreeable to you. It would probably be better for me not to come in to the United States as you approach the election crisis or our enemies might try to make mischief.
